# Translating.

Thank you for being interested in making Call of Cthulhu 7th Edition for Foundry VTT better! Below is a list of translations keys on existing files that still need translated, based on `en.json`. Feel free to create a new `*.json` file for a language that is not shown here!

The following translations are currently up to date **sv**, **zh-tw**

The following translations have more than 130 untranslated strings [are you able to help?](./ABANDONED.md)

[cs.json (159 untranslated strings)](./ABANDONED.md#csjson)

[it.json (197 untranslated strings)](./ABANDONED.md#itjson)

[pt-BR.json (355 untranslated strings)](./ABANDONED.md#pt-brjson)

[ru.json (277 untranslated strings)](./ABANDONED.md#rujson)

[uk.json (160 untranslated strings)](./ABANDONED.md#ukjson)
